page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.4xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier across most standard workloads. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1607.0 and a multi-core score of 9709.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 21137.68. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 850.62 GB/sec, which drops to 98.25 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Notably, the instance demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small language models, reaching 265.61 tokens per second, while maintaining average speeds of 11.61 tokens per second for medium models.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the ecs.r7t.4xlarge offers a balanced cost-to-resource profile for memory-intensive applications that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The absence of bundled local storage means storage costs are externalized to network volumes. This hardware configuration is well-suited for memory-optimized workloads such as database operations, caching layers, software compilation, and light language model inference tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.4xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, it offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate solid mid-tier performance, with a Passmark CPU score of 21137.68 and a Redis SET throughput of 15.92 million operations per second. It also exhibits strong text generation capabilities for small language models at 265.61 tokens per second. This instance is highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, including database operations, caching layers, and software compilation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for database and caching workloads.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 virtual server featuring high memory density and balanced compute performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

High memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong text generation performance for small language models
Optimized for database operations, caching, and software compilation
